title: Brachyphragma braumonii

This parasitic plant is native to China and is known to be a hemiparasite, obtaining some of its nutrients from the surrounding environment. The species is a part of the genus Brachyphragma, which is characterized by its unique parasitic lifestyle. Brachyphragma braumonii is often found growing on the roots of other plants, where it can absorb nutrients and water. The classification of Brachyphragma braumonii is still being studied and researched by botanists to gain a better understanding of its unique characteristics and behaviors.
